one_law: Machine grades not broken — positioning consistency, layout invariants, tokens, links, JSON integrity. Never grades desire.
verify_law: The agent that fixes failures may not produce the PASS. Re-run from Railway or founder Mac, >=60s after deploy, full-body hash per page.

forbidden_primary_phrases.pattern: ship AI work clients can verify
forbidden_primary_phrases.suggestion: Use execution-first footer from sourcea-positioning-v1.json one_line.

forbidden_primary_phrases.pattern: VERIFY from receipts — not chat theater
forbidden_primary_phrases.suggestion: Use Forge executes it — not chat theater (execution-first).
Use execution, Forge Terminal, examples, booking subtitle.

forbidden_primary_phrases.pattern: Ask about proof, pricing, Forge Terminal
forbidden_primary_phrases.suggestion: Use Ask what SourceA runs for you… placeholder.
SourceA is an execution platform — proof is a feature.
Use verify in your browser / on the page — agentic self-serve first.

forbidden_primary_phrases.pattern: We show real work on a call
forbidden_primary_phrases.suggestion: Use browser self-serve: Forge Terminal or live receipt.
Primary CTA: Try Forge Terminal. Escalation: Talk to a human.
Rename to Talk to a human and demote below Forge Terminal.
Use Try it yourself — self-serve framing.
Link to Forge Terminal or proof/live — no call bottleneck.
Live demo in browser — Forge Terminal or proof/live.
Footer: AI execution platform — proof built in.
Replace {ENTITY} with Noetfield Systems Inc. — v2 additions locked.
Unrendered mustache template — v2 additions locked.
Unrendered JS template literal — v2 additions locked.
Primary hero CTA must be Forge Terminal per sourcea-positioning-v1.json cta_order.

regex_checks.suggestion: Em-dash placeholder stats on proof-branded pages — wire trust JSON or inline real counts.
Unrendered template variable — render before ship.

structural_checks.rule: body sha256 == homepage sha256 and path != '/' => SPA_FALLBACK
discover paths from live sitemap.xml + live link BFS; emit live_only/dist_only diff
footer entity must be 'Noetfield Systems Inc.' on all pages
primary nav link-set: max 2 distinct fingerprints site-wide
every $ figure on any page must exist in canonical pricing table
audit receipts under reports/ only; no /Users/ path leaks in receipt body

reclassify.why: commercial SKU landers — dead-end money pages

forbidden_poison.suggestion: Use hello@sourcea.app — hello@sourcea.com is retired poison.

chatbot_required.suggestion: Brain greet must lead with execution platform positioning.

chatbot_required.pattern: What is Forge Terminal and how do I try it
chatbot_required.suggestion: Try Forge Terminal chip must stay in chat — sendUserMessage prompt.
Pricing chip must ask in chat before routing to pricing page.
Brain header must use head-drag + head-main structure (mobile-safe layout).

chatbot_forbidden.pattern: Try Forge Terminal", accent: true, action: () => (window.location.href = "/sourcea/forge/terminal")
chatbot_forbidden.suggestion: Do not hard-navigate away on Try Forge Terminal chip.
Do not dump stranger on pricing page from chip — ask in chat first.

css_brain_mobile_invariants.suggestion: .sa-brain-head must use flex-direction: column (prevents handle/brand crush).
.sa-brain-head-main must span full header width on mobile.
.sa-brain-head-brand needs min-width: 0 so subtitle can wrap.
